greeting: Ah, a customer! You have the look of someone with coin to spend.
Everything has a price, friend. Lucky for you, mine are fair.
Gerold's Goods — finest wares between Ashford and the capital.
quest: I've a shipment stuck at the ford. Bandits, they say. Retrieve it and I'll make it worth your while.
idle: The wool from Wynn's farm fetches less each season.
